rest_route_audit.authority_diagnostics_status: PROTECTED — returns 401 for unauthenticated (expected, not a bug)

confirmed_issues.system: EA Market Stream — bid/ask invalid value response
confirmed_issues.description: When bid/ask are present but invalid (zero, negative, infinite, or bid > ask), the handler audits but returns HTTP 200 with snapshots_inserted=0. The EA cannot distinguish a successful push from a price-validation failure.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: The `is_finite && $bid > 0 && $ask > 0 && $bid <= $ask` guard logs an audit but falls through without returning a structured error response.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Return WP_Error with code 'invalid_prices' and HTTP 422 when bid/ask validation fails, so the EA gets a non-2xx signal and can log or retry correctly.

confirmed_issues.system: Frontend — Prettier formatting drift in lint
confirmed_issues.description: 12 Prettier formatting errors across sdk/src/constants/symbols.ts, sdk/src/index.ts, sdk/src/mocks/fixtures.ts, src/mocks/sniperData.ts, src/hooks/useSniperData.ts, src/hooks/useStreamingTicks.ts. These are purely cosmetic and do not affect runtime behavior.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: Prettier config drift on recently added SDK files and minor edits not run through formatter.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Apply eslint --fix (Prettier auto-format). Already applied in Stage 10.

confirmed_correct: EA auth model: complete, uses hash_equals, all 4 header aliases, correct error codes/statuses
authority-diagnostics protected (401 for unauthenticated) — by design
Admin routes require manage_options — by design
EA market-stream stale rejection at 300s with 422 status code
OHLC validation: high >= max(open,close), low <= min(open,close)
Candle timestamp epoch guard (pre-2000 timestamps rejected)
tick_volume guard_tick_volume clamped to non-negative integer
FreshnessBadge renders backend-provided state (not locally derived)
VerdictBadge renders backend-provided verdict (not locally derived)
useSnapshot gated on backendReady && pollMs !== null (no orphaned polls)
quote_time takes precedence over timestamp via !empty() (not ??)
symbol alias map: GOLD→XAUUSD, USTECH100→NAS100, WALLSTREET30→US30 all correct
sniperClient.call() attaches Authorization or X-WP-Nonce; no EA token in frontend
Signal truth lives in backend (ensure_engine_snapshot), not frontend
